text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Demon Legs Narita Taishin does it!<n>Narita Taishin
takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Taishin! Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is going wild, but I can<n>hear her yelling
for me over the noise.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I jump the fence and go straight to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I get it. I understand now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't race because it's all I have or<n>because I
don't have any other<n>choice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I do it because this is what I want. Iwant to race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I want to win my races!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Basking in the cheers of the<n>audience, Narita
Taishin and I are<n>overjoyed in our newfound
resolve<n>to keep pushing forward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, I wanna talk to you about my<n>next goal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wanna run in the spring<n>Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket and Hayahide said they're<n>going for it too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was nowhere near their level when<n>we ran in the
Kikuka Sho. So...
choice_data_list: This is your chance to redeem yourself, then!
This is your chance to redeem yourself, then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're seriously so cringe when<n>you get
hyper-enthused like that, but...<n>yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I want you to help me prepare for it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With our sights set anew, Narita<n>Taishin and I
prepare for the spring<n>Tenno Sho!
